stack: Rust workspace (Axum 0.8) + React 19/Vite 7 (generated apps) + flint fabric
budget_note: Within caps. gh search returned empty (auth/quoting); compensated with cargo search + docs.rs + sibling-repo inspection.

candidates.name: rmcp
candidates.evidence: Official MCP Rust SDK. docs.rs + repo confirm stdio + streamable-HTTP transports, full capabilities (tools/prompts/resources/logging), BOTH server and client. Covers our HTTP-Streaming-only server constraint and the client role from one dependency.
candidates.notes: Pin exact version; verify the streamable-http server feature flag at integration. Two majors exist on crates.io (rmcp 2.0.0) vs docs.rs showing 1.7.0 — confirm the canonical line before pinning.

candidates.name: rust-mcp-sdk
candidates.evidence: Community SDK, server+client, streamable HTTP. Use only if rmcp's API proves unworkable.

candidates.name: a2a-protocol-types
candidates.evidence: Pure data types, serde only, no I/O, A2A v1.0. Exactly the Layer-0 shape our hexagonal architecture wants — composes into fpa-domain/fpa-protocol without dragging in a transport.
candidates.notes: Companion a2a-protocol-server (hyper) / a2a-protocol-client exist but are hyper-backed — we are Axum, so prefer the -types crate and implement transport on our own Axum routes. Early (0.6.0); wrap behind our own types so a swap is cheap.

candidates.name: a2a-rs
candidates.evidence: Fuller Rust A2A impl incl. a2a-web-client. Heavier; evaluate only if -types is insufficient.

candidates.name: hand-roll on frf-agentproto
candidates.evidence: Define A2A TaskEvent on top of the fabric's ContentBlock for ecosystem parity. Already partly done in fpa-protocol. Lower external risk, more in-house code.

candidates.name: agui-protocol
candidates.evidence: AG-UI protocol types + serde + SSE parser, transport-independent. Purpose-built and small. Companions agui-rs-server/agui-rs-client 0.1.x exist.
candidates.notes: Very early (0.1.0, low adoption). Risk of churn. Our current fpa-protocol::AgUiEvent + Axum SSE already works for the stub. Recommend: keep our types, optionally adopt agui-protocol's SSE parser if it saves real work — do not take a hard dependency on a 0.1 crate for the core type vocabulary.

candidates.name: hand-roll on Axum SSE + frf-agentproto
candidates.evidence: Already implemented in fpa-gateway routes/agui.rs; aligns to fabric ContentBlock. Lowest risk.

gaps.gap: Auth — consume flint-gate identity (NO direct Ory)

candidates.name: reqwest + jsonwebtoken
candidates.evidence: flint-gate is the ONLY auth boundary; this agent consumes gate-injected identity / gate-minted JWT and derives roles from claims. reqwest for any gate admin calls; jsonwebtoken to READ/validate gate-issued JWT against gate's published key. Mirrors flint-gate-core's own stack (reqwest 0.12 rustls + jsonwebtoken 9).
candidates.notes: Do NOT add ory-client/ory-kratos-client/oathkeeper. Do NOT copy fabric's frf-identity-ory→Oathkeeper adapter.

candidates.name: frf-agentproto (git dependency)
candidates.evidence: ContentBlock + proto types implemented; proto-v1 tag confirmed to exist. Git dep pins reproducibly and survives across machines. Gives wire parity with the fabric without vendoring.
candidates.notes: Cross-org SSH access required on every build machine (fabric=Prometheus-AGS). Factor into CI secrets.

gaps.gap: Frontend A2UI components (this agent's embedded UI + generated apps)

candidates.name: flint-forge React SDK
candidates.evidence: Intended end-state per user. Not yet implemented in forge.
candidates.notes: Build behind a swappable seam until it ships.

candidates.name: @prometheus-ags/a2ui-react
candidates.evidence: Published; EntityChat/EntityCopilot/EntityStream/EntityDiff/EntityApproval on entity-graph core. Closest real A2UI React library today.
candidates.notes: Alpha; pin and isolate behind the seam.

candidates.name: shadcn/ui (Base UI) + assistant-ui + HTMX
candidates.evidence: Firecrawl-confirmed: shadcn supports Base UI since Jun 2025; assistant-ui (YC W25) active for generative UI; HTMX for quick server-rendered prototyping.
candidates.notes: Local/HTMX components are scaffolding to be replaced by the forge SDK.

gaps.gap: Tauri 2 desktop+mobile shell with PWA fallback

candidates.name: Tauri 2
candidates.evidence: Firecrawl-confirmed v2 stable, iOS/Android ship from same Rust core, runtime detection standard.
candidates.notes: Cross-cutting UI constraint; deferred to a UI phase per the scope cut.

candidates.name: open-design (nexu-io) plugin/skill model
candidates.evidence: open-design.json manifest, plugins/+skills/ dirs, `od plugin list|install`, skill→plugin graduation, serialized export — firecrawl-confirmed.
candidates.notes: Plugin authored in OpenDesign's own stack (not this Rust workspace); export target = our Project artifact schema (req #2). Defer to a later phase.

candidates.name: forge ext-flint-llm (Ember) — in-DB embeddings/LLM
candidates.evidence: forge already houses KB/embeddings in ext-flint-llm (pgrx).
candidates.notes: Build the KB abstraction in fpa-app now; wire to forge/Ember via the forge port when forge's gateway exposes it.

key_adopt_verdicts: AG-UI: keep in-house types on Axum SSE (high); agui-protocol only as optional SSE-parser aid
Auth: reqwest + jsonwebtoken to consume flint-gate ONLY (high) — no Ory crates
